Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Justin McBride.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Paul Bartholomewis present.
Attorney Beth Hodess representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in the hallway for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JUL-16-2012 is vacated.
